categories.description: Accuracy of transcribed words and phrases
categories.comment: Good job! Just make sure you don't miss any of the filler words in the segments.
Overall good! Just remember to zoom all the way in and out to be able to trim the audio precisely.

categories.description: Correct use of punctuation and text formatting
categories.comment: There was only one case of a double dash instead of a single dash, but rather than that - good job!

categories.description: Proper use of speaker tags and emphasis markers

categories.comment: Nice catch on last segment (that it did not need to split in 2)
